question: Will "Scary Movie 6" earn more than $25M in domestic gross earnings (in US dollars) during their opening weekend?
textDescription: The question resolves as yes if the gross domestic box office revenue that the movie "Scary Movie 6" earns in its opening weekend exceeds 25 million US dollars according to https://www.the-numbers.com/movie/Scary-Movie-6-(2026) . If The Numbers fail to report the number within two weeks of a movie's release date other credible sources may be considered.
newsShortReason: Upcoming 'Scary Movie 6' release faces competition from established franchises.
newsKeyEvidence: 'Scary Movie 6' scheduled for June 5, 2026 release. | 'Scream 6' achieved $44.5 million opening weekend. | 'Obsession' horror film earned $17 million in its opening weekend. | 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' topped box office with $82 million opening. | 'Scary Movie 6' faces competition from 'Masters of the Universe' release.
